package rulecoverage

func PositiveCountThenFindSameFilter() string {
    ruleID := "count_then_find_same_filter"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Request-path GORM flows that run Count(...) and then a broad Find(...) with the same filter shape."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
